themes.exampleQuote: the raspberry lychee macaroon is the best thing I've ever put in my mouth hands down
Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed
Please do not miss this hidden gem in Pittsburgh
it is gluten free made with almond flour

notable_quote: Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently praise the caliber of the pastry work, singling out specific items like the raspberry lychee macaron, with 88 percent of 525 reviews at five stars and no meaningful pattern of complaints in the available sample.
quarter_narrative: Thirteen Pittsburgh creators posted 15 TikToks tagged at La Gourmandine Hazelwood this quarter, pulling nearly 737,000 plays, and the shop posted nothing to its own Instagram in that same stretch. The most recent creator video landed two days ago; the bakery's own last post was 41 days before that. In the Pittsburgh Sweets family, where Page's currently leads on social momentum, La Gourmandine holds the strongest review sentiment and a perfect conversion path setup, but the gap between what the city is making about this place and what the place is making about itself is the clearest variable separating it from a higher family rank. A single consistent posting cadence, pointed at the same product moments those 13 creators are already finding, is the most direct path up the board.
tldr_read: Dominant review sentiment, a perfect conversion path, and 737,000 TikTok plays from other people's accounts. Ones to Watch, first in Pittsburgh Pastry, sixth in Pittsburgh Sweets.
tldr_meaning: The review axis and discoverability infrastructure are already performing at or above family median; the remaining gap is entirely a social output problem, specifically a dormant Instagram and no owned TikTok presence in a quarter when 13 creators were actively filming the shop.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Sixth In Sweets, First In Pastry. The City Films It; The Bakery Has Gone Quiet.

playbook.headline: Restart Instagram before next week
playbook.action: The account has been silent for 41 days while 13 outside creators kept the shop visible; one post per week reactivates the momentum signal.

playbook.headline: Build a TikTok account around the macaron
playbook.action: The raspberry lychee macaron is the most-cited specific product; a short TikTok series on its production has a natural hook the 736,954 existing plays already proved out.

playbook.headline: Tag and respond to the 13 creators filming you
playbook.action: Acknowledging the creators who have already generated 737,000 plays deepens the collab relationship and increases the probability of repeat coverage without any production cost.
